states_list.name: INIT
states_list.description: Initial connection state, awaiting user identification.

states_list.name: AUTH_PENDING
states_list.description: Client has provided a username; server is waiting for password or additional credentials.

states_list.name: AUTHENTICATED
states_list.description: Successfully logged in. Ready for file system operations.

states_list.name: DATA_CHANNEL_READY
states_list.description: A data channel has been negotiated (Passive or Active mode) and is ready for a transfer command.

states_list.name: DATA_TRANSFER
states_list.description: A file or directory listing transfer is currently in progress.

states_list.name: RENAME_PENDING
states_list.description: The first half of a rename operation has been accepted. Waiting for the target name.

invariants_list.rule: LIST, RETR, STOR require prior successful authentication
QUIT terminates the session from any state
DATA commands typically require PASV or PORT first

ordering_rules: LIST, RETR, STOR require prior successful authentication

recommended_actions: Several observed message types are not yet represented in the state machine; prioritize seeds and probes for: ACCT, CAPI, CDUP, DELE, FEAT, HELP, MKD, MODE

suggested_campaign.objective: Increase post-auth and data-channel coverage while validating weaker transitions.

status_changes.rationale: Directly evidenced by trace showing the 331 response code for USER.
Trace evidence shows 530 error for PASS before USER, maintaining state.
Trace evidence shows 230 response code for successful login.
Trace indicates incorrect password allows retry (530), remaining in the auth state.
Trace evidence shows 221 response code for session termination.
Trace shows 227 response for data channel negotiation.
